keys.meta_description: Unify HR, finance, and operations on one workflow platform. Approvals, automation, and books that stay in sync—built for growing teams in APAC.
keys.hero_title: Run your business in one flow
keys.hero_description: One platform for people, money, and approvals—without spreadsheets or swivel-chair work.
keys.pillars_0_description: HR, finance, and ops on one record.
keys.pillars_1_description: Approvals and tasks without the chase.
keys.pillars_2_description: Audit trails and regional compliance built in.
keys.problem_subtitle: When work stalls, teams pay the cost.
keys.problem_0_tagline: Hand-offs stall when status lives in DMs.
keys.problem_1_tagline: Finance chases receipts across tools and files.
keys.problem_2_tagline: Leaders act on stale data with no audit trail.
keys.features_subtitle: One spine for how work runs.
keys.modules_0_tagline: Check-in to payroll on one approval path.
keys.modules_1_tagline: Capture and approve without the chase.
keys.modules_3_tagline: Publish approvals your team can maintain.
keys.stats_context: Teams report less manual work and faster month-end after switching.
keys.testimonial_title: Build automation on a real workflow spine
keys.testimonial_quote: Month-end used to take us three days of chasing data. Now it is a one-day review—the workflow spine handles what used to be manual hand-offs.
keys.testimonial_author_line: Sarah Lim, CFO at NovaTech Solutions
keys.testimonial_footnote: Join teams across Singapore and Southeast Asia.
keys.pricing_subline: Start small. Add automation as you grow.
keys.support_subtitle: Talk to our team, see a live demo, or start your free trial today.
keys.support_0_description: See the platform in action with a personalised walkthrough.
keys.support_1_description: 14-day Pro trial, work email required, no credit card.
keys.support_2_description: Discuss pricing, migration, or enterprise requirements.
keys.faq_0_q: What is included in the platform subscription?
keys.faq_0_a: You can move to a higher tier to add users, capacity, and support levels. We will help you right-size the plan as your usage and teams grow.
keys.faq_1_q: Are there user or system limits?
keys.faq_1_a: Each package has a user limit, but system usage (compute/storage) is scalable, and we offer pay-as-you-go options to support growth.
keys.faq_2_q: Can we start small and expand later?
keys.faq_2_a: Yes. Many teams begin with a smaller tier and move up as they onboard more users and workflows.
keys.faq_3_q: Who is the Enterprise plan best suited for?
keys.faq_3_a: It is designed for large organizations requiring dedicated instances, on-premise deployment, or those with strict security mandates that require isolated environments.
keys.faq_4_q: What payment methods do you accept?
keys.faq_4_a: We accept major credit cards, bank transfer, and invoice billing for annual plans. Contact us for enterprise payment options.
keys.faq_5_a: Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing period. Prorated credits may apply.
keys.faq_6_a: Yes. Start a 14-day free trial with full Pro access—verify your work email and begin onboarding the same day. No credit card required.
keys.faq_7_q: What happens if we exceed our user limit?
keys.faq_7_a: You can upgrade to a higher tier or add users via pay-as-you-go options. We will notify you before any overage charges apply.
keys.faq_8_a: Yes. Annual billing includes a 10% discount compared to monthly billing.
keys.faq_9_q: What do you mean by workflow automation?
keys.faq_9_a: It is the ability to run recurring business steps—notifications, routing, payroll windows, invoice dispatch—on rules you define, with full history instead of one-off manual clicks.
